title: Amtech - Claw Hammer, Durable Drop Forged Head, Comfortable Non-Slip Grip, Lightweight Steel Shaft, Ideal for Carpentry and DIY (16oz / 450g)
features: BALANCED 16oz (450g) HEAD: Provides the ideal weight for general hammering tasks, combining power with control for efficient results.
STRONG STEEL SHAFT: Ensures durability and reliability, withstanding repeated use in demanding DIY and trade applications.
TEXTURED GRIP HANDLE: Reduces slipping and improves handling, offering comfort and control during extended tasks.
VERSATILE CLAW DESIGN: Dual-purpose head allows both driving and removing nails, making it a must-have in any toolkit.
SUITABLE FOR DIY & PROFESSIONAL USE: Ideal for carpentry, home repairs, and general construction projects.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Box Contains 1x Hammer

specifications_table.Included Components: Amtech A0100 16Oz Claw Hammer - Steel Shaft
